label: plain_text
text:
1. What is the x-coordinate of a point on the y-axis?
2. Is there a similar
generalisation for a point on the x-axis?
3. Does
point
Q (y, x)
coincide with 1
point P (x, y)? J
everc
Justify
your
answer.
4. If x ≠ y, then (x, y) ≠ (y, x); and (x, y) = (y, x) if and only if x = y. Is this
claim true?
